steps.title: Let's build a Categorise quiz slide!
steps.description: A Categorise slide turns sorting tasks into a live quiz — participants drag items into the right buckets on their phones while results update on your screen. We'll build one together in under a minute. Click Next to begin.

steps.title: Create a new presentation
steps.description: Click 'New Presentation' to start a fresh deck.

steps.title: Pick the Categorise slide type
steps.description: Select 'Categorise' from the slide type picker. You'll find it in the Quiz section — it's the one that turns sorting into a scored game.

steps.title: Write your question
steps.description: Type the sorting challenge for your audience. Keep it clear — they'll need to know exactly which items belong in which bucket.

action.value: Sort these animals into the correct group
action.hint: Type your question, then click away

steps.title: Add the items to sort
steps.description: Enter all the items participants will drag into categories. Separate them with commas — AhaSlides splits them automatically.

action.value: Lion, Eagle, Salmon, Frog, Whale, Hawk
action.hint: Type the items, separated by commas

steps.title: Name your first category
steps.description: Give Category A a name — this is the first bucket participants will sort items into.

steps.title: Add a second category
steps.description: Click 'Add Category' to create as many buckets as you need. You can have up to 8 categories in one slide.

steps.title: Ready to go live!
steps.description: That's all it takes to build a Categorise quiz slide. When you're ready for showtime, hit 'Present' — your audience joins on their phones and sorts items into categories in real time.
